case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. EDNA B JONES et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, EDNA B $2,448.62 PRINCIPAL, $563.52 INTEREST, $279.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,291.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION CCP 1033 B 1 & 2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST EXCESS OF 10% AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION RE: INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, EDNA B DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-26-2008
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE
